allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add dedicated documentation workspace with named note persistence

Creates a professional documentation command center at /documentation with template gallery, client selector, large editor, AI assistance, and saved-items rail for managing named documentation entries.

Upgrades note persistence to support real titles instead of body-only notes, enabling the documentation center to save entries as named records across workspace_store.py, case_management routes, and frontend note hooks.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
Bash(find databases -name "*.db" -exec sh -c 'echo ""=== {} ==="" && sqlite3 ""{}"" ""SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type=\""table\"";"" 2>/dev/null | grep -i service' ;)
